title: RetroArt Retextured
description: A Programmer Art add-on that retextures modern Minecraft blocks to match the classic pre-1.14 aesthetic. Includes retro-style ores, obsidian variants and more.
body:
🌟 RetroArt Retextured — Programmer Art Add-On

RetroArt Retextured is an add-on for Programmer Art that reimagines modern Minecraft textures in the classic, pre-1.14 style.
It restores the old pixel-heavy look, rough shading, and noisy patterns — making new blocks fit naturally into the nostalgic aesthetic.

🎨 Features

Crying Obsidian retextured using the classic Obsidian palette
Nether Gold Ore in old Netherrack style
All Deepslate Ores redesigned to match the classic stone ores
Custom Copper & Netherite ingots styled like pre-1.14 items
Fully consistent with Minecraft 1.13 Programmer Art
Clean, pixelated retro look — no modern shading
Lightweight, no mods required

📌 Requirements

⚠ This is an add-on, not a standalone pack.
To work correctly:

Enable Programmer Art
Place RetroArt Retextured ABOVE Programmer Art
Minecraft Version: 1.21.x

🧩 Compatibility

Minecraft Java Edition
Version 1.21.x
Works with Vanilla, Fabric, Forge, NeoForge, Quilt

No dependencies required

📚 Credits

Original textures © Mojang Studios
Classic base textures from Minecraft 1.13 Programmer Art
All modified or new textures created by Alry FireBlade

🛠 Tools Used

Paint.NET
Resourcepack format based on 1.21.x

📜 License

This pack may:
✔ Be used privately
✔ Be edited for personal use
✔ Be used together with Programmer Art

This pack may NOT:
✘ Be reuploaded elsewhere
✘ Be redistributed as your own
✘ Be included in modpacks without permission

License: All Rights Reserved (ARR)

💬 Feedback

Found an inconsistency or have a suggestion for another retro texture?

📣 Contact me:

Discord: alryfireblade
Minecraft: Alry_FireBlade
